special-whois-title: Title of the special page Special:Whois.
special-whois-intro: Description appearing on top of Special:Whois.
special-whois-info: First heading with info about IP address.
special-whois-report: Heading for the full WHOIS report
special-whois-email: Label of the contact e-mail address (abuse-mail).
special-whois-tool: Label of WHOIS link in the toolbar.
special-whois-error: Error message when no valid IP adress provided.
